tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Filter merged PRs that close a Linear issue
(def prs-with-linear
  (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

(count prs-with-linear)"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Extract the linear issue IDs from PRs
(def linear-ids
  (map :closes_linear prs-with-linear))

(def unique-linear-ids
  (distinct linear-ids))

(count unique-linear-ids)"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Fetch the Linear issues
(def linear-issues-map
  (linear_issues {:id unique-linear-ids}))

(count linear-issues-map)"}

tool_calls.input:
{"code":";; Create a map from linear issue id to state

  (zipmap (map :id linear-issues-map) (map :state linear-issues-map)))

{"code":";; Report: PR number, Linear issue id, and Linear state
(def report

            state (get linear-state-map linear-id)]
        {:pr-number (:number pr) 
         :linear-id linear-id
         :linear-state state}))
    matching-prs))
